headline: A Look At International Paper’s (IP) Valuation After A Year Of Weaker Share Price Performance
summary: Recent performance snapshot for International Paper International Paper (IP) has been on many investors’ radar after a period of weaker share performance, with the stock down 2.2% on the day, 2.5% over the past week and 28.3% over the past year. Over the past month the share price declined 0.5%, and over the past 3 months it fell 15.9%. This leaves the company valued at about US$17.8b based on a last close of US$32.86 per share.
